name: Hardware question or build help
about: Schematic, BOM, Gerber, or PCB-related question that isn't a bug.

labels: ["hw", "docs"]
assignees: []

## What I'm trying to do

<!-- e.g. "I want to substitute a different LED colour" or
     "I'm trying to source a USB-C TP4056 module instead of micro-USB". -->

## Where I'm stuck

<!-- What specifically is unclear, missing, or doesn't match your build.
     Link the relevant section of docs/BOM.md or the schematic. -->

## What I've already tried

<!-- e.g. "I read docs/BOM.md and the supplier link was out of stock,
     so I checked Mouser and found XYZ — is it equivalent?" -->

## Build context

<!-- Anything that helps the maintainer answer: PCB rev (V1/V2),
     where you are in the world (for shipping / supplier suggestions),
     whether this is for a kit, a personal build, or a school project. -->
